allow: PowerShell($p='src/core/App.js'; $bytes=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $text=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $orphan="       // \(note: prior 'Now we check for termData' comment removed during qualified-id refactor\)`n"; if\($text -notmatch [regex]::Escape\($orphan\)\){Write-Output 'orphan-not-found'} else {$text=$text.Replace\($orphan,''\)}; $trail='this.state.currentModalTitle = termData.title; // Save title to state for LLM injection'; if\($text -notmatch [regex]::Escape\($trail\)\){Write-Output 'trail-not-found'} else {$text=$text.Replace\($trail,'this.state.currentModalTitle = termData.title;'\)}; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p,[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($text\)\); Write-Output 'OK')

PowerShell($p='src/core/App.js'; $bytes=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $text=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $orphan="       // \(note: prior 'Now we check for termData' comment removed during qualified-id refactor\)`r`n"; if\($text.Contains\($orphan\)\){$text=$text.Replace\($orphan,''\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p,[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($text\)\); Write-Output 'OK'} else {Write-Output 'still-not-found'})
